images.prompt: Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: I was playing in a giant bouncy house, and all my friends were there, and we jumped super high almost to the sky!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.
Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: I dreamed I was flying super high like a bird, and I could touch the clouds!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.

Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: I dreamed I was playing with a giant talking puppy, and it gave me a piggyback ride all the way to the moon!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.
